offer: For property managers handling 10-20 properties, inefficient reporting causes delayed insights on property performance. We automate reporting instead of manual spreadsheets and email updates.
problem: Inefficient reporting processes lead to delayed insights on property performance.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property management advice
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on reporting tools
DM 20-50 property managers with demo video
Share insights in property management forums and groups
try_it: Let users try customizable reporting templates and user-friendly dashboard for performance tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
